songs.title: Aathi Raasathi
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Instrumental Intro)
[00:06.00] Aathi raasathi en aasa raasathi...
[00:12.00] Kannukkulla unna vachen, nenjukkulla thirudi vachen...
[00:18.00] Adi parandhu pona paravaiye thirumbi vandhiduya...
[00:24.00] Unna mattum nenechikittu kaathirukken na...
[00:30.00] Aathi raasathi en aasa raasathi...
[00:36.00] (Sitar Beat playing)
[00:42.00] Enakku mattum sondhamaanava nee thandha kaadhal...
[00:48.00] Endha naalum azhiyadhadhu namadhu ulaavum...

songs.title: Pavazha Malli Unplugged
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Acoustic Guitar Intro)
[00:05.00] Pavazha malli... un vaasam ennai izhukkudhe...
[00:11.00] Pesum vizhiye... un paarvai ennai kolludhe...
[00:17.00] Mella mella saiyum un thozhil en mugam thudikkindradhe...
[00:23.00] Unplugged melodies for late night thoughts...
[00:29.00] (Guitar strum chord)
[00:35.00] Enna seiyadhanum kaadhal thandhuvidu nee...

songs.title: Thalapathy Kacheri
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (High Energy Drums)
[00:04.00] Thalapathy kacheri aarambam...
[00:08.00] Adra melatha... kottra thaalatha...
[00:12.00] Thalaivan varuvan, mass kaatuvan...
[00:16.00] Varalaru ezhudhuda, gethu kaattuda...
[00:20.00] (Heavy bass drops)
[00:25.00] Thalapathy kacheri aarambam...

songs.title: Chella Magale
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Soft Flute Melody)
[00:05.00] Chella magale... en kannin maniye...
[00:11.00] Un punnagaiye... en vaazhvin valiye...
[00:17.00] Thanthai anbe... unnaithaan kaakkum endrume...
[00:23.00] (Instrumental Orchestral Swell)
[00:29.00] Un chinna viral thottal en valigal maraiyume...

songs.title: Bloody Valentine
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Pop Punk Drum Fill)
[00:05.00] In my head, in my head, I couldn't hear anything else...
[00:10.00] But you, but you, you're my bloody valentine...
[00:15.00] I'm not letting you go tonight...
[00:20.00] (Guitar riff solo)
[00:25.00] Can we keep this state of mind forever?

songs.title: Poga Poga
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Acoustic Slide Guitar)
[00:05.00] Poga poga dhooram kuraiyume...
[00:11.00] Paadhaigal namakku vazhividume...
[00:17.00] Enodu nee nadandhuvandhal ulagam peridhillai...
[00:23.00] (Violin solo theme)
[00:29.00] Poga poga nam valigal inbamaagume...

songs.title: Kannukulla Reprise
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Soft Keys Intro)
[00:05.00] Kannukulla nikkiromen... enna solla poromen...
[00:11.00] Reprise version with dhanush vocal texture...
[00:17.00] Kaadhal vandhadhum nenjam marandhadhum unmaiya...
[00:23.00] (Strings melody)
[00:29.00] Adiye kannukulla ezhudhi vachen unnaiye...

songs.title: Pavazha Malli
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Electronic Beats Intro)
[00:06.00] Pavazha malli... oru nadhiya pola pogudhe...
[00:12.00] Enadhu nenjam... unnaithaan paadudhe...
[00:18.00] Kannil theriyum aasaigal podhum...
[00:24.00] (Synth chords synth loop)
[00:30.00] Vaa vaa kaadhal devadhaiye vaa...

songs.title: Paranthene Penne
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Violin Orchestration)
[00:05.00] Paranthene penne... un kaadhal vizhiyile...
[00:11.00] Vizhundhene penne... un varthai valiyile...
[00:17.00] Inimel naanum illaiye enadhu kaiyile...
[00:23.00] (Piano solo riff)
[00:29.00] Ennaiye thandhen unadhu nizhalile...

songs.title: Oorum Blood
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Metal Heavy Riffing)
[00:04.00] Oorum blood-um vegu vegamaaga yerudhu...
[00:08.00] Leo varan paaruda... bayam ellam oduda...
[00:12.00] Badass ma... scene-u vera maari ma...
[00:16.00] (Industrial Synth beat drops)
[00:20.00] Blast and blood... badass theme...

songs.title: Mutta Kalakki
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Acoustic Trumpet Intro)
[00:05.00] Mutta kalakki pottu... pepper-a thoovi vidu...
[00:11.00] Parotta saalna oothuda... hot-aa thindru mudida...
[00:17.00] Street food special... thakali kooda chutney...
[00:23.00] (Gana beat fast tempo)
[00:29.00] Kalakki anthems for local vibes...

songs.title: Singari
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Urumi & Thavil Folk Drums)
[00:05.00] Singari unadhu thaavani ennai saaikkudhu...
[00:11.00] Thangame unadhu kolusu satham mayakkudhu...
[00:17.00] Marudhaani vachadhu yendi... vaasathai koottudhu...
[00:23.00] (Fast Folk dance beat)
[00:29.00] Adiye en singari unnai thookka poren ma...

songs.title: Raathu Raasan
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (80s Analog Synthesizer)
[00:06.00] Raathu raasan varan... raani nee odhu...
[00:12.00] Pullanguzhal isaiyum... maattu vandi sathamum...
[00:18.00] Kaathukulla ketkudhu kaadhal sandhoshama...
[00:24.00] (Retro electric guitar chords)
[00:30.00] Raathu raasan varan raani nee odhu...

songs.title: Jilpanso
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Retro Synthpop Pop Beat)
[00:05.00] Jilpanso... jilpanso... jilendru oru varthai...
[00:11.00] Un kannil naan kanda kaadhal kavidhai...
[00:17.00] Mella pesum penne... ennaikolladhe...
[00:23.00] (Chiptune loop playing)
[00:29.00] Jilpanso hits for happy visualizer dance...

songs.title: Alapuzha Sandhayila
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Water ripple effect & Violin)
[00:06.00] Alapuzha sandhayila... ponnu paatha niramellaam...
[00:12.00] Kadhali kooda boat ride... backwater melodies...
[00:18.00] Chithramma kuralin thaimaiyil inimai...
[00:24.00] (Light percussion drum)
[00:30.00] Alapuzha sandhayila ponnu paatha niramellaam...

songs.title: God Mode Begins
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Epic Orchestral Brass)
[00:05.00] Hook theme: Tiger Ka Hukum...
[00:10.00] Rajinikanth screen presence... god mode begins...
[00:15.00] Adra badass bgm... blast building shakes...
[00:20.00] (Heavy rock bass guitar drop)
[00:25.00] God Mode Begins - Unleash the power...

songs.title: Verappa
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Acoustic Folk Mandolin)
[00:05.00] Verappa varanda... murukku meesaikkaran...
[00:11.00] Oorellaam sollanumda... namadhu gethu varalaaru...
[00:17.00] Kootu koodi nadakka vendum unmaiyaaga...
[00:23.00] (Hand clapping acoustic rhythm)
[00:29.00] Verappa varanda gethu kaatta varanda...

songs.title: Aasa Pulla
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Ambient Keyboard Pad)
[00:06.00] Aasa pulla en aasa pulla... arugil vaadi nee...
[00:12.00] Un vaasam pattu en valigal odudhe...
[00:18.00] Sid sriram deep expressive humming...
[00:24.00] (Swell of violins)
[00:30.00] Kaadhal thandhu ennai kaathu nilladi nee...

songs.title: Raathu Raasan 1
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Analog Keyboard & Tabla)
[00:06.00] Raathu raasan part 2 theme...
[00:12.00] Inbamaana satham ketkum thenral adippadhil...
[00:18.00] Kaadhal vazhigal kooda inbamaagume penne...
[00:24.00] (Vintage electric violin solo)
[00:30.00] Oorum ketkum kavidhaigal paadi nillada...

songs.title: Karuppa Kooda Va
songs.lyrics:
[00:00.00] (Modern EDM Synths)
[00:05.00] Karuppa kooda va... enodu aadi va...
[00:11.00] Kuthu beat-il kalakki va... dance floor aadi va...
[00:17.00] Sai abhyankkar groovy rhythm loop...
[00:23.00] (EDM high pitch riser)
[00:29.00] Blast the speaker... karuppa theme kicks in...
